allow: Bash(tree -L 3 -I 'node_modules' "/Users/G's m/taskflow" 2>/dev/null || find "/Users/G's m/taskflow" -not -path "*/node_modules/*" -type f -o -type d | grep -v node_modules | sort)
Bash(export PATH="/opt/homebrew/bin:$PATH" && pg_isready -U technomix && echo "PostgreSQL is running")

Bash(export PATH="/opt/homebrew/bin:$PATH" && psql -U technomix -d postgres -c "SELECT 1 FROM pg_database WHERE datname='taskflow';" | grep -q 1 && echo "Database already exists" || psql -U technomix -d postgres -c "CREATE DATABASE taskflow;" && echo "Database created")

  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -d '{"name":"Test User","email":"test@taskflow.dev","password":"secret123"}' | python3 -m json.tool 2>/dev/null || echo "Register done")

Bash(TOKEN="eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJ1c2VySWQiOiJjbW1rbDcydjgwMDAwYjRsbndqMm1mc3lyIiwiaWF0IjoxNzczMTQ1NzQ3LCJleHAiOjE3NzM3NTA1NDd9.PefJn0urVOL76JYipwQb3Ssw_lV-axa4D8OUZRtZgiA"

  -d '{"title":"Launch Q1 campaign","description":"Prepare all assets","status":"IN_PROGRESS","dueDate":"2026-03-15"}' \\
